'''Muchardis Mulaxis''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ayrou/Legends|Ayrou]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who represented [[Maya Kovel/Legends|Maya Kovel]] and the [[Moddell sector/Legends|Moddell sector]] up until [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]. During the [[Caamas Document Crisis]], he was skeptical of [[Borsk Fey'lya]]'s claims that the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]] did not know which clans bore responsibility for the [[Caamas Firestorm|destruction]] of [[Caamas/Legends|Caamas]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
